text: Herminia

text: The third daughter of the famed House Bertolini. After their parents' death, she and her sisters inherited the family's vast fortune. She's known for her philanthropy, and has been trying to use her newfound wealth to enrich the lives of everyone on the continent.

text: Commander Tytos
text_joined: Commander Tytos

text: The commander of the Scarlet Wings, a subset of the Knights Ardante. He's hailed as the greatest swordsman on the continent, but humbly denies these claims and shows no interest whatsoever in wielding authoritative power. He currently devotes all his efforts to rehabilitating former criminals.

text: Schwartz
text_joined: Schwartz

text: A playwright for a small theatre troupe. He lives a modest life with his wife—a former actress—and his son. Uninterested in achieving great fame, he's content to put on smaller productions, which are highly regarded by his audience.

text: An elderly apothecary who spent his years traveling the land, healing the sick and wounded. Several years ago he suffered a grave injury and lost the use of one of his arms, and so he set out for Donescu to settle into a quiet retirement. He'd only just put down roots when G'roha showed up, and now he is tormented by his inability to help those suffering around him.

text: A third-generation resident of this town who worked an average job doing nothing out of the ordinary. Grievously wounded and his family gone, he no longer has any idea of how to face his cruel new reality. How can one live after everything has been taken from them?

text: Ferryman

text: An ex-soldier turned ferryman, he retired from the army when he realized he had no talent for fighting. He'd been ashamed of this decision until he began helping crowds of refugees escape the fighting by ferrying them to safety. The sight of him maneuvering his craft through the chaos of war, unbent and undaunted, gave courage to the terrified townsfolk.

text: Military Scholar
text_joined: Military Scholar

text: A scholar recording the history of the war against G'roha and the fate of those left in its wake. The locals view him as compassionless for these efforts, but he is in fact driven by great empathy. He hopes that recording the horrors that unfolded here will prevent future generations from repeating the same mistakes. He grits his teeth when insults are flung his way and continues his thankless task.

text: A compassionate woman born to a wealthy family. Though her home and fortune were untouched in the war, she was stricken by a sense of powerlessness when she saw the damage her town had endured. Discovering reserves in herself she didn't know she had, she wiped away her tears and stood up with fierce determination in her eyes. Her newfound goal is to grow strong so she can protect those she loves.

text: A weather-beaten soldier who has served Donescu since the reign of the previous king. text: Patriotic Bard
text_joined: Patriotic Bard

text: As a minstrel searching for a champion to extol, he wandered the continent until he finally stumbled into Donescu. There, he witnessed the gallant form of King Dudek courageously striding into almost certain death, and was struck with inspiration—here indeed was a hero worthy of song! Though the king perished, this bard remains, composing ballads to the king's nobility and strength.

text: Noble Maiden of Misfortune
text_joined: Noble Maiden of Misfortune

text:
[Cause of death: Illness]
Daughter of one of the greatest noble houses in Edoras. Her father's opposition to the war on the Westerlings displeased King Pardis III, and the family was stripped of its wealth, rank, and everything else. Tried her best to survive by any means necessary, but her efforts won her only illness that finally took her life.

text:
[Cause of death: Illness]
An official of Ferian, a kingdom that fell four centuries ago. At the time, the Cliftlands were a mere subject province of Ferian, which greedily mined them for resources. Seeing the poverty this created, he petitioned for more merciful governance, but the king banished him, and he threw in his lot with the poor and downtrodden.

text: Shrinekeeper Ataraxia
text_joined: Shrinekeeper Ataraxia

text: Shrinekeeper and head priestess, Ataraxia is the highest authority on Agapea, and formerly served as Thumb. Strict but kind, she is beloved by many of the maidens, and she cherishes them as her daughters in turn. The island is known only to a select few within the Order as a means to protect it from subversive elements, and Ataraxia is highly vigilant to anything that could rupture this veil of secrecy.

At times tempestuous, at times gentle, he has deftly crafted the story of this world along with Rugis and the others.
text_joined:
A wordsmith of great skill and love.

At times tempestuous, at times gentle, he has deftly crafted the story of this world along with Rugis and the others.

text: Nishikiano
text_joined: Nishikiano

text:
A travelling musician.

By singing of, embellishing, and at times even hindering the journeys of travelers, his songs carve out a path to adventure from start to finish.
text_joined:
A travelling musician.

By singing of, embellishing, and at times even hindering the journeys of travelers, his songs carve out a path to adventure from start to finish.

text: Negiwata Belaren
text_joined: Negiwata Belaren

text:
A traveling gourmand and world-builder.

He possesses an impressive memory and encyclopedic knowledge of the world. As Delan always says, "When you have lost your way, ask Negiwata."

It is said that he is one of a chosen few that Rugis trusts to watch his back.
text_joined:
A traveling gourmand and world-builder.

He possesses an impressive memory and encyclopedic knowledge of the world. As Delan always says, "When you have lost your way, ask Negiwata."

It is said that he is one of a chosen few that Rugis trusts to watch his back.

text: Sapa Vienne
text_joined: Sapa Vienne

text:
A man who has supported the reconstruction of the town from the shadows, away from the fanfare.

His kind eyes see far and wide, and have captured many sights over the years.
text_joined:
A man who has supported the reconstruction of the town from the shadows, away from the fanfare.

His kind eyes see far and wide, and have captured many sights over the years.

text: Joun Lemon
text_joined: Joun Lemon

text:
A man who walked the continent to create a map that would become an invaluable resource for all travelers.

He boldly defied those who worried that "a detailed map may be too difficult to create."

That the completed map even shows the locations of treasure chests is said to be his achievement.
text_joined:

He boldly defied those who worried that "a detailed map may be too difficult to create."

That the completed map even shows the locations of treasure chests is said to be his achievement.

text: Norimas Winlook
text_joined: Norimas Winlook

text:
A man who is always destitute for some reason.

Adding to the puzzle is that he is a master architect that can build a house several times quicker than your average carpenter.

He is shy and quiet, but is quite funny when you can get him to talk.
text_joined:
A man who is always destitute for some reason.

He is shy and quiet, but is quite funny when you can get him to talk.

text: Naga Yamante
text_joined: Naga Yamante

text:
A storyteller who deftly spins engaging tales with wit and humor.

Though an honored veteran of his craft, he still sees a long road ahead of him.

His journey has just begun.
text_joined:
A storyteller who deftly spins engaging tales with wit and humor.

Though an honored veteran of his craft, he still sees a long road ahead of him.

His journey has just begun.

text: Kana Shiba
text_joined: Kana Shiba

text:
Honest. Detailed. Motivated. A studious man that is liked by everyone.

The grit and effort in each of his footsteps created the many paths of travel in this world.
text_joined:
Honest. Detailed. Motivated. A studious man that is liked by everyone.

The grit and effort in each of his footsteps created the many paths of travel in this world.

text: Kohi Tahkar
text_joined: Kohi Tahkar

text:
An artist who observes moving objects such as falling snow, and all manner of things that adorn the world, which he then recreates with a meticulous hand.

It is said that the world moves as fluidly as it does because of his efforts.
text_joined:
An artist who observes moving objects such as falling snow, and all manner of things that adorn the world, which he then recreates with a meticulous hand.

It is said that the world moves as fluidly as it does because of his efforts.

text: Yu Yai
text_joined: Yu Yai

text:
A dedicated artisan who facilitated the ease of movement that all who have gathered here enjoy.

It is thanks to his efforts that all the others were able to take a step forward.
text_joined:
A dedicated artisan who facilitated the ease of movement that all who have gathered here enjoy.

It is thanks to his efforts that all the others were able to take a step forward.

text: Mikaro Mirahim
text_joined: Mikaro Mirahim

text:
A jeweler who specializes in delicate ring crafting.

It is said that the dullest of jewels regain their luster when put into his hands.
text_joined:
A jeweler who specializes in delicate ring crafting.

It is said that the dullest of jewels regain their luster when put into his hands.

text: Ryoma
text_joined: Ryoma

text:
A high seas sailor who carves out routes in the pathless oceans.

Even with the fate of his ship and his entire crew in his hands, he never once faltered.

He will continue to guide ships through the oft treacherous seas, like a shining beacon emanating from the harbor.
text_joined:
A high seas sailor who carves out routes in the pathless oceans.

Even with the fate of his ship and his entire crew in his hands, he never once faltered.

He will continue to guide ships through the oft treacherous seas, like a shining beacon emanating from the harbor.

text: Shiba Rique
text_joined: Shiba Rique

text:
A gladiator who always stands for the people, at times taking center stage in the arena, and at times formulating detailed plans behind the scenes.

Because she always acts with people's hearts in mind, she has saved countless souls in the past, and will continue to save more in the future.
text_joined:
A gladiator who always stands for the people, at times taking center stage in the arena, and at times formulating detailed plans behind the scenes.

Because she always acts with people's hearts in mind, she has saved countless souls in the past, and will continue to save more in the future.

text: Mineji
text_joined: Mineji

text:
A dramatist whose work is much celebrated on another continent. He was summoned here by Rugis to collaborate.

It is said that any and all matters of diplomacy that Rugis could not see to himself was handled deftly by Mineji.
text_joined:
A dramatist whose work is much celebrated on another continent. He was summoned here by Rugis to collaborate.

It is said that any and all matters of diplomacy that Rugis could not see to himself was handled deftly by Mineji.

text: Ihsa Yabok
text_joined: Ihsa Yabok

text:
Ryoma's mentor. A cunning strategist who specializes in banishing darkness. He is also a fierce warrior who can charge the enemy alone and take the hill if need be.

His favorite quote is, "Old soldiers do not die, they just fade away."
text_joined:
Ryoma's mentor. A cunning strategist who specializes in banishing darkness. He is also a fierce warrior who can charge the enemy alone and take the hill if need be.

His favorite quote is, "Old soldiers do not die, they just fade away."

text: Myano Wincy
text_joined: Myano Wincy

text:
A man who paves paths of travel.

When lacking necessities, he is always able to procure them on his own somehow. You can wager that his pack will be full of items on his next journey.
text_joined:
A man who paves paths of travel.

When lacking necessities, he is always able to procure them on his own somehow. You can wager that his pack will be full of items on his next journey.

text:
I have listened to this song countless
times. It evokes many memories.
text_joined:
I have listened to this song countless
times. It evokes many memories.

text:
It's unfortunate, but I can't sell this
to you.
text_joined:
It's unfortunate, but I can't sell this
to you.

text: Kamimu Shisuya
text_joined: Kamimu Shisuya

text:
A man who, through his unique vision, has breathed life into countless distinctive individuals.

The people of Orsterra owe their existence to his accomplishments.
text_joined:
A man who, through his unique vision, has breathed life into countless distinctive individuals.

The people of Orsterra owe their existence to his accomplishments.

text: Mikey Gold
text_joined: Mikey Gold

text:
A craftsman that oversees the ways, means, and flow of battle.

Through rain, sleet, and snow, his earnest demeanor has supported others in immeasurable ways.
text_joined:
A craftsman that oversees the ways, means, and flow of battle.

Through rain, sleet, and snow, his earnest demeanor has supported others in immeasurable ways.

text: Den Skeyo
text_joined: Den Skeyo

text:
A man whose sincerity brings both richness and order to his tales.

He first weaves the path that a good story must follow, then carefully watches the travelers who walk it.
text_joined:
A man whose sincerity brings both richness and order to his tales.

He first weaves the path that a good story must follow, then carefully watches the travelers who walk it.

text: Escon Satour
text_joined: Escon Satour

text:
A dramatist whose passion infuses intense heat into every story.

Without Escon, the tale of this journey would have never seen the light of day.
text_joined:
A dramatist whose passion infuses intense heat into every story.

Without Escon, the tale of this journey would have never seen the light of day.

text: Akkirua
text_joined: Akkirua

text:
A jack-of-all-trades who always handles sudden requests from Myano swiftly and efficiently.

His travels have left an indelible mark in this world; in the towns, the people, and the story.
text_joined:
A jack-of-all-trades who always handles sudden requests from Myano swiftly and efficiently.

His travels have left an indelible mark in this world; in the towns, the people, and the story.

text: Rhiae Iga
text_joined: Rhiae Iga

text:
An inventor of theatrical contraptions that shine light upon the world.

The light she brings is at times gentle and at times harsh, but it always provides color to the world.
text_joined:
An inventor of theatrical contraptions that shine light upon the world.

The light she brings is at times gentle and at times harsh, but it always provides color to the world.

text: Yu Sakh
text_joined: Yu Sakh

text:
A builder that has constructed roads, towns, and even caves.

One can only guess how many memories and thoughts reside within a mind that created the entire continent.
text_joined:
A builder that has constructed roads, towns, and even caves.

One can only guess how many memories and thoughts reside within a mind that created the entire continent.

text: Velle Rice
text_joined: Velle Rice

text:
An architect that brought reason to the world.

Heeding the teachings of his predecessors, he carefully crafted the continent into its present form.
text_joined:
An architect that brought reason to the world.

Heeding the teachings of his predecessors, he carefully crafted the continent into its present form.

text: Tsuka Tashiba
text_joined: Tsuka Tashiba

text:
A Knight Ardante who was tasked with escorting the group along the right path.

His kind words have encouraged many and guided them towards the light.
text_joined:
A Knight Ardante who was tasked with escorting the group along the right path.

His kind words have encouraged many and guided them towards the light.

text: Neumann Hiro
text_joined: Neumann Hiro

text:
A dramatist who infused life into the town and its residents.

By giving purpose to the everyday folk, he provided more weight and truth to the world.
text_joined:
A dramatist who infused life into the town and its residents.

By giving purpose to the everyday folk, he provided more weight and truth to the world.

text: Haggie Harrar
text_joined: Haggie Harrar

text:
A playwright who brought love and emotion into the world.

Only a hand that could fully grasp the human heart and bare it for all to see could have brought such truth to this tale.
text_joined:
A playwright who brought love and emotion into the world.

Only a hand that could fully grasp the human heart and bare it for all to see could have brought such truth to this tale.

text: Higtis Ayu
text_joined: Higtis Ayu

text:
A veteran dramatist who has supported this tale for a very long time.

For every evening she spent with us, a new drama was born.
text_joined:
A veteran dramatist who has supported this tale for a very long time.

For every evening she spent with us, a new drama was born.

text: Ruggs Shohashi
text_joined: Ruggs Shohashi

text:
A scholar and playwright who uses tried and tested (if not dubious) methods to solve various predicaments.

He agreed to join this journey even at the sacrifice of his ailing back.

He is owed a debt that Rugis, Delan, and Myano can never fully repay.
